message:
chore(beads): update issue tracker SQLite database state

Sync the beads.db SQLite database with current issue tracker state.
The database was compacted from 1179648 to 1081344 bytes, reflecting
routine maintenance including resolved issues and pruned historical
entries for the storage ballast helper project.
